evals.name: reuse-and-projection-on-inbox-query
spec-gaps-on-new-port
impact-sweep-on-schema-change
evals.prompt: I'm adding a new persisted column LinkedQuoteRefNo (nullable string) plus a LinkedQuoteName (nullable string) to the Order entity so the inbox can show the linked quote's reference. The column add itself and the migration approach are settled by a prior ADR. Grill the implementation — what else does adding these two properties to Order touch across the Sales codebase that I need to handle in this slice before I open the PR?

evals.name: cross-boundary-contract-drift-on-vm-change
